submissions.synthesis_method: <how you synthesized x2 mod21 controlled: e.g. MMD transformation-based on the 32-value permutation, fixed on 21..31>
submissions.self_check: assembled is a permutation; q0=1 maps y->(2y mod21) on 0..20, fixed on 21..31

_note: Only gates from GATE-VOCABULARY.json. targets length = gate n_qubits. Multi-control X: leading targets=controls, last=target. Steps apply left-to-right. No matrix-gate shortcut. iqft7 bloq is OPTIONAL (h/swap/cz/cs_dag/cr3_dag..cr7_dag) if you also want to corroborate the inverse-QFT circuit.
